message:
fix(core,mvcc,parser): CTE cleanup on error, physical merge simplification, and semantic analysis refinement

CTE Cleanup Guarantee:
- Move cleanup_cte_tables() outside the inner closure in execute_select_with_ctes,
  execute_delete_with_ctes, and execute_update_with_ctes so temporary CTE tables
  are always cleaned up even when the DML statement fails
- materialize_with_clause() now takes &mut Vec<String> outparam instead of
  returning Vec<String>, so temp_names are available for cleanup regardless
  of whether materialization succeeded

Physical Merge Simplification:
- Remove FreeSpaceConflict error variant and FreeSpaceOp::Defragment enum
  since free-space ops are safely mergeable (the page is fully repacked using
  canonical layout, so defragmentation intent is naturally preserved)
- merge_structured_patches() now takes the union of free-space ops instead
  of conservatively rejecting when either patch has free-space operations

Semantic Analysis:
- Refine expression type inference for CASE expressions to improve query
  planning accuracy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
